settings.title: Welcome to the AEC PM Connect Kansas City Cloud

settings.editor:
A heartfelt thank you to all our incredible attendees and sponsors of the 2025 AEC PM Connect.

We deeply appreciate your continued support and participation, and we hope your
time in Kansas City was both enjoyable and enriching.

All session materials, handouts, and recordings are stored here
for your continued learning and application.

The official event workbook is your companion guide to applying what you learned during the 2025 Kansas PM Connect Event. 

Inside, you’ll find:

  • Key takeaways and summaries from each session

  • Step-by-step exercises to reinforce learning

  • Worksheets and checklists for project application

  • Space for reflection and action planning

settings.text: Discover What’s Ahead – AEC PM Connect 2026

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: Join AEC PM Connect 2025 in Kansas City for exclusive networking, expert insights, and game-changing strategies in AEC project management!
